---
title: Personnages-chats
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779805919/catpeoplecolor_jmyegt.png
description: Des chats humains en couleur
categories: ["miscellaneous"]
date: 2025-12-26
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779805919/catpeoplecolor_jmyegt.png)
